response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies are not adapted to the pressure of water  
their immune system reacts to peanuts and prevents them from entering the body  
the environment underwater is not suitable for those with peanut allergies  
the body's systems are not designed to handle the conditions of underwater living  

Sec. 2  
peanuts are a food source that is not safe for underwater environments  
the pressure of water affects the body in ways that are not compatible with human physiology  
the lack of oxygen and the presence of saltwater make underwater living dangerous  
the body's ability to function in water is limited by the natural limitations of human biology
